scope: Revenue Outlook lazy render and default sensitivity fast path
finding: Revenue Outlook reruns paid about 647.91 ms for default sensitivity audit/overlay work and rendered multiple audit/table sections eagerly.
change: Added cached selector/view helpers keyed by runtime signature and controls, skipped default sensitivity overlay work, and moved heavy audit/detail sections behind explicit lazy toggles.

scope: Revenue Outlook lightweight primary bridge path
finding: The default cached primary view still materialized line reconciliation, formula residual and stack-component frames before any detail section was opened.
change: Added an include_derived_frames switch to the PED bridge layer, used a lightweight bridge path for the default primary cached view, and added a separate cached detail-frame helper for composition, reconciliation and PED diagnostics.

evidence.tests: focused primary/detail split tests passed before full validation

scope: Revenue Outlook PED bridge audit matching
finding: The remaining default primary bridge path still checked unmatched rows by scanning every PED bridge audit key.
change: Replaced the row-scan fallback with exact, no-source, no-fed and no-source/no-fed lookup maps that preserve the original matching order.

evidence.parity: Inline parity check matched old row-scan behavior for chart, bridge, future and line frames.
evidence.tests: Focused fallback semantics and primary-view tests passed before full validation.

scope: Revenue Outlook PED bridge impact audit generation
finding: After fallback matching was optimized, the default Revenue Outlook cold path still spent about 691 ms generating the PED bridge impact audit by repeatedly scanning line-reconciliation rows for each baseline and unit lookup.
change: Built first-row value and unit lookup dictionaries once per impact-audit call and reused them for every selected PED bridge audit record.

evidence.tests: python -m compileall app.py model_dashboard passed; Revenue Outlook test slice passed: 31 passed; bounded verify_dashboard.ps1 -SkipBrowser passed; host verify_browser_host.ps1 on port 8515 passed: 40 passed.

scope: Revenue Outlook default sensitivity detail audit
finding: The all-Off sensitivity detail path computed formula residuals twice: once for the residual table and again for stack components.
change: Computed formula residuals once and passed the same frame into revenue_stack_components_frame.

evidence.tests: python -m compileall app.py model_dashboard tests passed; Revenue Outlook test slice passed: 32 passed; bounded verify_dashboard.ps1 -SkipBrowser passed; host verify_browser_host.ps1 on port 8515 passed: 40 passed.

scope: Revenue Outlook PED bridge audit application
finding: The PED bridge audit application helper still used iterrows and per-cell assignments for chart, bridge, future and line reconciliation frames.
change: Built candidate arrays once, preserved the existing exact/no-source/no-fed fallback lookup order, and assigned adjusted values, labels, deltas and warnings in batches.

evidence.tests: python -m compileall app.py model_dashboard tests passed; Revenue Outlook test slice passed: 32 passed; bounded verify_dashboard.ps1 -SkipBrowser passed; host verify_browser_host.ps1 on port 8515 passed: 40 passed.

finding: Opening PED bridge diagnostics or line reconciliation used the full detail-frame helper, which also built stack components needed only by the composition expander.
change: Added scoped cached helpers for PED bridge diagnostics and line reconciliation; kept full stack construction isolated to the composition/detail helper.

evidence.tests: python -m compileall app.py model_dashboard tests passed; Revenue Outlook test slice passed: 34 passed; bounded verify_dashboard.ps1 -SkipBrowser passed; host verify_browser_host.ps1 on port 8515 passed: 40 passed.

scope: Revenue Outlook primary path chart builder
finding: The first-viewport Total path chart still spent avoidable time in per-row hover DataFrame.apply calls and Plotly add_vline helpers on every visible render.
change: Built primary-chart hover customdata with lightweight list construction and emitted forecast/selected-FY markers as direct layout shapes and annotations.

evidence.tests: python -m compileall app.py model_dashboard tests passed; Revenue Outlook test slice passed: 37 passed; bounded verify_dashboard.ps1 -SkipBrowser passed; host verify_browser_host.ps1 on port 8515 passed: 40 passed.

scope: Revenue Outlook visible figure cache wrappers
finding: The cached Revenue Outlook primary view returned filtered rows, but the visible Total path and uncertainty fan Plotly figures were still rebuilt on every rerun.
change: Added cache_data wrappers for the Total path and fan figures keyed by the runtime signature and visible controls, while excluding already-derived DataFrames from cache hashing.

evidence.tests: python -m compileall app.py model_dashboard tests passed; Revenue Outlook/cloud test slice passed: 54 passed; bounded verify_dashboard.ps1 -SkipBrowser passed; host verify_browser_host.ps1 on port 8515 passed: 40 passed.

finding: The lazy Revenue composition expander still rebuilt selected stack rows and the Plotly composition figure whenever the expander was open.
change: Added a single-pass composition stack helper plus cache_data wrappers for the filtered composition stack and figure, keyed by runtime signature, bridge mode, sensitivity key and visible composition controls.

evidence.tests: python -m compileall app.py model_dashboard tests passed; Revenue Outlook/cloud test slice passed: 55 passed; bounded verify_dashboard.ps1 -SkipBrowser passed; host verify_browser_host.ps1 on port 8515 passed: 40 passed.

scope: Revenue Outlook line reconciliation table cache
finding: The lazy line reconciliation expander still rebuilt the filtered reconciliation rows and formatted display table on every open-state rerun.
change: Added a cache_data line reconciliation view returning both raw filtered rows for downloads and the formatted display table, keyed by runtime signature, bridge mode, sensitivity key and visible table controls.

evidence.tests: python -m compileall app.py model_dashboard tests passed; Revenue Outlook/cloud test slice passed: 56 passed; bounded verify_dashboard.ps1 -SkipBrowser passed; host verify_browser_host.ps1 on port 8515 passed: 40 passed.

scope: Revenue Outlook selected-FY detail figure cache
finding: The lazy selected-FY detail branch rebuilt both the component drill-down and revenue split figures whenever the branch was open.
change: Added a cache_data wrapper that materializes the selected-FY component and split figures as a pair, keyed by runtime signature, selected FY, FED path, bridge mode and sensitivity key.

evidence.tests: python -m compileall app.py model_dashboard tests passed; Revenue Outlook/cloud test slice passed: 57 passed; bounded verify_dashboard.ps1 -SkipBrowser passed; host verify_browser_host.ps1 on port 8515 passed: 40 passed.

scope: Revenue Outlook EV/PHEV audit display cache
finding: The lazy EV/PHEV migration and legacy split audit branches still rebuilt formatted display tables on every open-state rerun.
change: Added cache_data wrappers for the selected EV/PHEV migration audit view and the EV/PHEV split display table, keyed by the committed runtime signature and visible audit mode, and fixed the composition branch to use the cached stack for table/download rendering.

evidence.tests: python -m compileall . passed; Revenue Outlook/cloud test slice passed: 59 passed; full pytest passed: 404 passed, 50 skipped, 41 deselected; bounded verify_dashboard.ps1 -SkipBrowser passed; host verify_browser_host.ps1 on port 8515 passed: 40 passed.

finding: The lazy Activity and volume outlook branch still filtered activity rows and rebuilt the Plotly activity figure on every open-state rerun.
change: Added a cache_data wrapper for the activity-volume figure, keyed by committed runtime signature, time grain, FED path, selected traces, sensitivity key and PED bridge mode.

evidence.tests: python -m compileall . passed; Revenue Outlook/cloud test slice passed: 61 passed; full pytest passed: 406 passed, 50 skipped, 41 deselected; bounded verify_dashboard.ps1 -SkipBrowser passed; host verify_browser_host.ps1 on port 8515 passed: 40 passed.
